name: You are the daughter of King Aron and Queen Milisa.
description:
You are a daughter of the Elidor royal family. Your parents King Aron and Queen Milisa are very strict, but also caring. They decide your future and discuss it with you.

______________________

What will you do? Will you be an obedient daughter and an example for everyone, or will you rebel and do whatever you want?

______________________
